title: Carvana (CVNA) crowded unwind, late 2022
source: Representative reconstruction of public daily closing prices for the episode window. Captures the real magnitude (~75% peak-to-trough decline) and shape (accelerating, disorderly, with the violent Dec 6-7 cliff on creditor-cooperation/bankruptcy-fear news). The live path can refresh exact closes via the Market Data MCP (Alpha Vantage TIME_SERIES_DAILY); this committed fixture is the offline behavioural-fidelity reference.
note: Carvana was simultaneously a crowded long and a crowded short. When solvency fears hit, holders rushed the exit into evaporating bid-side support. This is the empirical anchor the calibration critic checks the simulated crowd against: the real crowd's behaviour was violent and disorderly, not orderly.
